title: Colour Changing Egg Timer,Easy to Read and Use Kitchen Egg Cooking Timer,Reusable Boiled Eggs Tool for Soft Medium Hard Eggs
features: Accurate Cooking Results: This colour changing egg timer helps you boil eggs to perfection every time. The heat-sensitive surface darkens gradually, showing exact doneness levels for soft, medium, or hard-boiled eggs.

Easy to Use: Simply place the timer directly into the pot with your eggs. As the water heats, the timer changes colour to show precise cooking stages. No guesswork, just perfectly cooked eggs every time.

Reusable & Durable: Made with safe, heat-resistant material, this egg timer can be used repeatedly. The solid construction ensures it withstands daily cooking use, making it a reliable kitchen accessory.
Two Vibrant Colours: Available in bright yellow and red, the egg timer is easy to spot in your kitchen. The colourful design adds a fun and practical touch to your cooking experience.

Perfect for All Kitchens: Ideal for families, students, and cooking lovers. Whether for breakfast, meal prep, or a healthy snack, this egg timer ensures consistent results and saves time in the kitchen.
description: Wellrun Colour Changing Egg Timer,Easy to Read and Use Kitchen Egg Cooking Timer,Reusable Boiled Eggs Tool for Soft Medium Hard Eggs
